channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Early Wildfires Threaten Homes and Endangered Forests in California
item.description: California is experiencing an unusually active wildfire season earlier than usual, fueled by high winds, heat, and a dry winter. The Santa Rosa Island Fire, sparked by a sailor's distress flares in Ch...

item.title: Government Notifies Standards for Higher Ethanol-Petrol Blends up to E30
item.description: The Government of India has officially notified new standards for higher ethanol-petrol blends, specifically E22, E25, E27, and E30, allowing ethanol content in petrol to exceed the current 20% level....

item.title: Sean Duffy Defends Sponsored Road Trip Series Amid Ethical Concerns
item.description: Sean Duffy, the U.S. Transportation Secretary, has defended a forthcoming YouTube series called 'The Great American Road Trip', which he and his family filmed in celebration of America's 250th birthda...

item.title: Trump Endorses Paxton, Raising GOP Concerns Over Senate Control
item.description: Republicans are expressing concern that former President Donald Trump's recent endorsement of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton could jeopardize their control of the Senate in the upcoming 2026 midter...

item.title: DA Files Criminal Complaint Over CETA Administrator's Excessive Salary
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has lodged criminal charges against Oupa Nkoane, an administrator at the Construction Education and Training Authority (CETA), over the approval of his own annual salary o...

item.title: Putin and Xi meet in Beijing to strengthen Russia-China relations and discuss global issues
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin met Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing for a high-level summit, following a recent visit by US President Donald Trump. The meeting, described by officials as a priva...

item.title: Historic Magic Show Posters from the Early 20th Century
item.description: During the early 1900s, magic show posters emerged as a unique form of visual storytelling, capturing the imagination of the public and promoting the era's most famous magicians. Artists employed vibr...

item.title: The Challenges of Political Accountability in Post-Brexit Britain
item.description: George Monbiot’s commentary examines the erosion of political accountability, using Nigel Farage as a central example. Farage, a prominent advocate for Brexit, is described as having contributed signi...

item.title: Harry Styles’ team addresses fans’ obstructed view concerns during Amsterdam shows
item.description: Harry Styles’ management has addressed complaints from fans regarding obstructed views during his ongoing 'Together, Together' tour. Following the opening nights at Amsterdam’s Johan Cruijff Arena, se...

item.title: President Samia Suluhu Hassan Calls for Stronger African Collaboration on Nuclear Energy Development
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has urged African countries to work together more closely in developing nuclear energy. She made these remarks during the Nuclear Energy Innovation Summit for Africa (NEI...

item.title: Michael Biehn’s Iconic Role as Kyle Reese in The Terminator
item.description: Michael Biehn's portrayal of Sgt. Kyle Reese in the 1984 film 'The Terminator' is widely recognized as one of the most emotionally compelling performances in science fiction cinema. While Arnold Schwa...

item.title: African leaders advocate nuclear energy as key to industrial and digital growth
item.description: African leaders have emphasised the importance of nuclear energy in driving the continent’s industrialisation and digital transformation during the Nuclear Energy Innovation Summit for Africa (NEISA 2...

item.title: Federal Judge Issues Controversial Order Affecting Transgender Minors' Medical Records
item.description: U.S. District Judge Reed O'Connor, appointed by George W. Bush, has issued a highly controversial order directing Rhode Island Hospital to provide private medical records and Social Security numbers o...

item.title: Athletics Defeat Angels 14-6 with Strong Offensive Showing from Nick Kurtz, Brent Rooker, and Zack Gelof
item.description: The Oakland Athletics overcame the Los Angeles Angels with a 14-6 victory on Tuesday night in Anaheim, powered by an outstanding performance from Nick Kurtz. Kurtz, the reigning American League Rookie...

item.title: Proposal suggests requiring banks to verify customers’ immigration status amid policy debate
item.description: A report indicates that former U.S. President Donald Trump has proposed or is considering a policy that would require banks to examine or verify the immigration status of their clients. The idea appea...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of 'The Graduate' with Dustin Hoffman and Katharine Ross
item.description: The 1967 film 'The Graduate' tells the story of Benjamin Braddock, a recent college graduate played by Dustin Hoffman, whose disillusionment with life leads him into a complicated affair with Mrs. Rob...

item.title: Capucine: Icon of French Fashion and Hollywood Cinema
item.description: Capucine, born Germaine Lefebvre, was a celebrated French model and actress who left a lasting mark on both the fashion and film industries. She began her career in Paris as a fashion model, becoming ...

item.title: Family of Rachel Wandeto Demands Justice After Her Death While Confirming Political Support for Ruto
item.description: The family of gospel singer Rachel Wandeto has spoken out following her tragic death, allegedly after being set on fire in Mwiki, Kasarani. Rachel was known for openly supporting President William Rut...

item.title: Letter Writer Seeks Advice After Discovering In-Law’s Partner Eating Meat Despite Vegan Claims
item.description: A reader wrote to Carolyn Hax seeking guidance after discovering that their sister-in-law’s partner, James, who presents himself as vegan, was caught eating a burger. James has a reputation for being ...

item.title: SCA restores family’s RAF claim after high court wrongly dismissed it
item.description: The Supreme Court of Appeal (SCA) has overturned a Mpumalanga high court decision that denied a mother and her minor child the right to claim loss of support from the Road Accident Fund (RAF). The hig...
